sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board changed after clicking on the purple block. Let me check what changed by comparing the before and after frames. I need to see if something was selected or if the blocks moved.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on purple block
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before nodes count:", len(before['nodes']))
print("After nodes count:", len(after['nodes']))
print()

# Check for changes in each node
for nid in after_nodes:
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    an = after_nodes[nid]
    if bn:
        if bn['hash'] != an['hash'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels'] or bn['boundary'] != an['boundary']:
            print(f"Node {nid} CHANGED:")
            print(f"  before: color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}, boundary={bn['boundary']}")
            print(f"  after:  color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}, boundary={an['boundary']}")
    else:
        print(f"Node {nid} NEW: color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}")

for nid in before_nodes:
    if nid not in after_nodes:
        print(f"Node {nid} REMOVED: color={before_nodes[nid]['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
